name: Frozen Lemon Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs carefully, using only Grade A Uncracked Eggs.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks and 1/2 cup sugar until light in color.
3. Stir in the lemon juice.
4. In a small mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
5. Gradually add the remaining 2 tablespoons of sugar to the beaten egg whites, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the lemon juice mixture.
7. Carefully incorporate half of the whipped cream into the mixture.
8. Fold in the remaining whipped cream.
9. Spoon the filling into the prepared crust.
10. Freeze for at least 3 hours or until firm.
11. Serve with additional whipped cream or Blueberry 'n' Spice Sauce.
